stories.title: Vrabel: I had 'difficult' talks over Russini photos
stories.summary: Mike Vrabel said the Patriots and their fans will get "the best version of me going forward" after the New York Post published photos that appeared to show the coach embracing and holding hands with former Athletic reporter Dianna Russini.

stories.title: Gilgeous-Alexander wins Clutch Player of the Year
stories.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's trophy case is getting bigger as the reigning MVP added the Clutch Player of the Year award to his sterling résumé.

stories.title: Sanders touts 'new vibe' under Browns' Monken
stories.summary: Shedeur Sanders said there is a "new vibe" and "new energy" with the Browns under first-year coach Todd Monken and his staff.

stories.title: Donovan leaves Bulls amid sweeping changes
stories.summary: Billy Donovan has decided to step down as head coach of the Bulls after six seasons.

stories.title: Kentucky governor blasts decision-making at UK
stories.summary: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear has publicly questioned the decision-making at the University of Kentucky, including the seven-figure gig retiring athletic director Mitch Barnhart was recently given.
